component.name: Dupont
component.summary: Set your desktop wallpaper from Bing and Spotlight

description.p: Dupont is a native Linux desktop application for setting wallpapers from online sources. It fetches wallpapers from Bing Wallpaper of the Day and Microsoft Spotlight.

ul.li: Fetch wallpapers from Bing Wallpaper of the Day and Microsoft Spotlight
Wallpaper preview with metadata (title, description, attribution)
Configurable Bing market and Spotlight locale

description.p: GNOME Portal backend for wallpaper setting, binary renamed to dupont, Rust 2024 edition.
